notAvailablePage.title: Clone not available
notAvailablePage.body: This repo hasn't been cloned locally yet, so its specs, docs, and insights can't be discovered. Try again once the clone is ready.

emptyPage.title: No documents found
emptyPage.body: Add markdown files under specs/, docs/, or insights/ anywhere in the repo and they'll show up here.

drawer.resyncWarning: This file is tracked in the repo. Saving here edits the local clone only — the next resync from the remote may overwrite your changes.
